metadata.title: Return Policy
metadata.text: Customers can return unopened items within 10 days of delivery. Refunds are processed within 5 business days after inspection.

metadata.title: Coupon Usage Help
metadata.text: Only one coupon can be applied per order. Expired coupons cannot be reactivated. Some coupons are limited to new users only.
